name: create_many_message_channel_message_association_message_folders
description: Create multiple Message Channel Message Association Message Folders records in a single call. Provide an array of records, each containing the required fields. Maximum 20 records per call. Returns the created records.

records.description: Array of records to create. Each record should contain the required fields. Maximum 20 records per call.

position.description: Use "first" to insert at the top, "last" for the bottom, or a number for explicit ordering. Leave empty to place at the top (recommended).
